#### Reference issue
Closes #21421.

#### What does this implement/fix?
Updates the `dev-quickstart` guide to refer directly to the "Building From Source for SciPy Development" guide instead of duplicating the instructions.

#### Additional information
This change helps to reduce maintenance burden and ensures that the information in the `dev-quickstart` guide is consistent with the more up-to-date instructions.

#### Reference issue
Closes #21421.

#### What does this implement/fix?
Updates the `dev-quickstart` guide to refer directly to the "Building From Source for SciPy Development" guide instead of duplicating the instructions.

#### Additional information
This change helps to reduce maintenance burden and ensures that the information in the `dev-quickstart` guide is consistent with the more up-to-date instructions.

#### Reference issue
Closes #21421.

#### What does this implement/fix?
Updates the `dev-quickstart` guide to refer directly to the "Building From Source for SciPy Development" guide instead of duplicating the instructions.

#### Additional information
This change helps to reduce maintenance burden and ensures that the information in the `dev-quickstart` guide is consistent with the more up-to-date instructions.

#### Reference issue
Closes #21421.

#### What does this implement/fix?
Updates the `dev-quickstart` guide to refer directly to the "Building From Source for SciPy Development" guide instead of duplicating the instructions.

#### Additional information
This change helps to reduce maintenance burden and ensures that the information in the `dev-quickstart` guide is consistent with the more up-to-date instructions.

#### Reference issue
Closes #21421.

#### What does this implement/fix?
Updates the `dev-quickstart` guide to refer directly to the "Building From Source for SciPy Development" guide instead of duplicating the instructions.

#### Additional information
This change helps to reduce maintenance burden and ensures that the information in the `dev-quickstart` guide is consistent with the more up-to-date instructions.
